# subscript(_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Creates a new block buffer that references a subrange of this block buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
subscript(range: Range<CMReadOnlyDataBlockBuffer.Index>) -> CMReadOnlyDataBlockBuffer { get }
```
